---
title: "Time Management"
subtitle: "How does the clock affect your play?"
---

```{r setup}
source(here::here("R", "functions.R"))
con <- get_site_db()
player_moves <- load_site_player_moves(con)
my_moves <- player_moves %>% filter(is_player_move)
```

## ACPL by Time Remaining

```{r time-acpl}
time_acpl <- my_moves %>%
  filter(!is.na(centipawn_loss), !is.na(clock_time_remaining)) %>%
  mutate(
    time_category = case_when(
      clock_time_remaining <= 10 ~ "Critical (<10s)",
      clock_time_remaining <= 30 ~ "Low (10-30s)",
      clock_time_remaining <= 60 ~ "Medium (30-60s)",
      clock_time_remaining <= 180 ~ "Comfortable (1-3m)",
      TRUE ~ "Plenty (>3m)"
    ) %>%
      factor(levels = c("Critical (<10s)", "Low (10-30s)", "Medium (30-60s)",
                         "Comfortable (1-3m)", "Plenty (>3m)"))
  ) %>%
  group_by(time_category) %>%
  summarise(
    acpl = mean(centipawn_loss, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_moves = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

plot_ly(time_acpl, x = ~time_category, y = ~acpl, type = "bar",
        marker = list(color = ~acpl,
                      colorscale = list(c(0, "#4CAF50"), c(1, "#F44336"))),
        text = ~sprintf("%.1f", acpl),
        textposition = "outside",
        textfont = list(color = "#f0d9b5"),
        hovertemplate = "%{x}<br>ACPL: %{y:.1f}<br>Moves: %{customdata}<extra></extra>",
        customdata = ~n_moves) %>%
  layout(
    title = list(text = "Avg Centipawn Loss by Time Remaining (lower is better)", font = list(color = "#f0d9b5")),
    xaxis = list(title = "Time Remaining", gridcolor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.1)"),
    yaxis = list(title = "Avg Centipawn Loss", gridcolor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.1)"),
    paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    font = list(color = "#adb5bd")
  )
```

## Average Time Spent per Move

```{r time-per-move}
time_by_move <- my_moves %>%
  filter(!is.na(clock_time_remaining)) %>%
  arrange(game_id, ply_number) %>%
  group_by(game_id) %>%
  mutate(
    time_spent = lag(clock_time_remaining) - clock_time_remaining,
    move_number = ceiling(ply_number / 2)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(!is.na(time_spent), time_spent >= 0, move_number <= 60) %>%
  group_by(move_number) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_time = mean(time_spent, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_time = median(time_spent, na.rm = TRUE),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

plot_ly(time_by_move, x = ~move_number) %>%
  add_trace(y = ~avg_time, type = "scatter", mode = "lines",
            name = "Mean", line = list(color = "#f0d9b5", width = 2),
            hovertemplate = "Move %{x}<br>Avg: %{y:.1f}s<extra></extra>") %>%
  add_trace(y = ~median_time, type = "scatter", mode = "lines",
            name = "Median", line = list(color = "#b58863", width = 2, dash = "dot"),
            hovertemplate = "Move %{x}<br>Median: %{y:.1f}s<extra></extra>") %>%
  layout(
    title = list(text = "Time Spent per Move", font = list(color = "#f0d9b5")),
    xaxis = list(title = "Move Number", gridcolor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.1)"),
    yaxis = list(title = "Seconds", gridcolor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.1)"),
    paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    font = list(color = "#adb5bd"),
    legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.15)
  )
```

## Time Pressure Frequency

```{r time-pressure}
pressure_thresholds <- c(10, 30, 60)

pressure_freq <- my_moves %>%
  filter(!is.na(clock_time_remaining)) %>%
  group_by(game_id) %>%
  summarise(
    min_time = min(clock_time_remaining),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

pressure_stats <- tibble(
  threshold = paste0("< ", pressure_thresholds, "s"),
  seconds = pressure_thresholds,
  games_affected = map_int(pressure_thresholds, ~ sum(pressure_freq$min_time < .x)),
  total_games = nrow(pressure_freq)
) %>%
  mutate(pct = games_affected / total_games * 100)

plot_ly(pressure_stats, x = ~threshold, y = ~pct, type = "bar",
        marker = list(color = c("#F44336", "#FF9800", "#FFC107")),
        text = ~sprintf("%.0f%% (%d games)", pct, games_affected),
        textposition = "outside",
        textfont = list(color = "#f0d9b5"),
        hovertemplate = "%{x}<br>%{text}<extra></extra>") %>%
  layout(
    title = list(text = "How Often Does the Clock Get Low?", font = list(color = "#f0d9b5")),
    xaxis = list(title = "Time Threshold", gridcolor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.1)",
                 categoryorder = "array", categoryarray = paste0("< ", pressure_thresholds, "s")),
    yaxis = list(title = "% of Games", gridcolor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.1)"),
    paper_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    plot_bgcolor = "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
    font = list(color = "#adb5bd")
  )
```

## ACPL by Time Control Category

```{r acpl-by-tc}
tc_acpl <- my_moves %>%
  filter(!is.na(centipawn_loss), !is.na(time_control_seconds)) %>%
  mutate(tc_category = classify_time_control(time_control_seconds)) %>%
  group_by(game_id, tc_category) %>%
  summarise(
    acpl = mean(centipawn_loss, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

tc_category_order <- c("Bullet", "Blitz", "Rapid", "Classical")
tc_colors <- c("Bullet" = "#F44336", "Blitz" = "#FF9800", "Rapid" = "#4CAF50", "Classical" = "#2E86AB")

p <- tc_acpl %>%
  mutate(tc_category = factor(tc_category, levels = tc_category_order)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = tc_category, y = acpl, fill = tc_category)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.7, scale = "width") +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, fill = "#adb5bd", alpha = 0.6, outlier.shape = NA, color = "#f0d9b5") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = tc_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "ACPL Distribution by Time Control (lower is better)",
    x = "Time Control",
    y = "Avg Centipawn Loss"
  ) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

ggplotly(p) %>% dark_plotly()
```

```{r cleanup}
disconnect_db(con)
```
